questions.q: Scientists at which organization recently discovered a powerful new opioid that relieves pain without dangerous side effects, as published in Nature?
options: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
questions.correctText: Researchers at the National Institutes of Health (NIH) identified a new opioid that provides strong pain relief without typical risks.

questions.q: According to a new study on human echolocation, what happens in the brains of expert blind echolocators as they use mouth clicks to perceive their surroundings?
options: The brain processes a single "optimal snapshot" of sound.
Neural activity related to object location weakens with more clicks.
Information about object location accumulates over successive clicks, building spatial representations.
Only visual areas of the brain are activated.
questions.correctText: New experimental EEG studies found that the accuracy of expert echolocators improved with each click, suggesting the brain accumulates acoustic evidence over time to build spatial representations.

questions.q: According to reports on April 7, 2026, more than 800 people were arrested by US Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) following tips from what federal airport security agency?
What entertainment company announced massive layoffs across its TV, film, and corporate divisions in a recent reorganization?
questions.correctText: Sony Pictures Entertainment announced hundreds of layoffs in a recent reorganization.

questions.q: Which life science-focused specialty finance company did Runway Growth Finance Corp. recently acquire for $249.0 million, expanding its healthcare and life sciences exposure?
questions.correctText: Runway Growth Finance Corp. closed its acquisition of SWK Holdings Corporation for $249.0 million.

questions.q: What major US agricultural equipment manufacturer agreed to pay $99 million to settle a 'right to repair' class-action lawsuit on April 7, 2026?
What major milestone did the Artemis II mission, launched on April 1, 2026, achieve as it journeyed around the Moon?
options: Successfully landed humans on the lunar surface.
Broke the record for the farthest distance humans have traveled from Earth.
Discovered water ice at the lunar south pole.
questions.correctText: The Artemis II mission, launched on April 1, 2026, is expected to break the record for the farthest distance humans have travelled from Earth as it performs a lunar flyby.

questions.q: As of April 3, 2026, how much did United Airlines increase its first checked bag fee by for flights within the U.S., Mexico, Canada, and Latin America?
questions.correctText: United Airlines increased its first checked bag fee by $10, making it $45 for flights within the U.S., Mexico, Canada, and Latin America.

questions.q: What is the name of the new fund Prime Minister Mark Carney launched on April 7, 2026, to address infrastructure gaps across Canada with a $51-billion investment over 10 years?
questions.correctText: Prime Minister Mark Carney officially launched the Build Communities Strong Fund, a $51 billion investment over 10 years, on April 7, 2026, to address infrastructure gaps across the country.

questions.q: On April 7, 2026, what action did Iran reportedly take regarding its direct diplomatic communications with the United States?
options: Requested UN mediation for direct talks
questions.correctText: On April 7, 2026, Iran reportedly cut off direct diplomatic communications with the United States, although indirect talks were continuing through mediators.
